gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.FG <= 150 OR T2.FG >= 450 AND T1.Birthday > '1980-01-01'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) 
FROM Patient AS T1
JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T1.Birthday > '1980-01-01'
AND (T2.FG < 150 OR T2.FG > 450)
question: How many patients born after 1980/1/1 have an abnormal fibrinogen level?
